---
title: "Immune Checkpoint Inhibitors in Neoadjuvant Treatment of Triple-Negative Breast Cancer: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis"
format:
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    papersize: letter
    geometry:
      - margin=1in
    fontsize: 11pt
    linestretch: 2
    number-sections: true
    toc: false
    keep-tex: true
  docx:
    reference-doc: template.docx
    number-sections: true
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: true
bibliography: references.bib
csl: lancet.csl
---

{{< include 00_abstract.md >}}

\newpage

{{< include 01_introduction.md >}}

\newpage

{{< include 02_methods.md >}}

\newpage

{{< include 03_results.md >}}

\newpage

{{< include 04_discussion.md >}}

\newpage

# References {.unnumbered}

::: {#refs}
:::

\newpage

# Tables

{{< include tables/Table1_Trial_Characteristics.md >}}

\newpage

{{< include tables/Table2_Efficacy_Summary.md >}}

\newpage

{{< include tables/Table3_Safety_Summary.md >}}

\newpage

# Supplementary Materials

{{< include tables/SupplementaryTable1_RiskOfBias.md >}}

\newpage

{{< include tables/SupplementaryTable2_PDL1_Subgroup.md >}}

\newpage

{{< include tables/SupplementaryTable3_Individual_pCR_Results.md >}}

\newpage

{{< include tables/SupplementaryTable4_GRADE_Profile.md >}}
